title: Hotrodz Urban City Track Set, 25 Pieces, Battery-Operated Car Included, Multiple Layouts, Ages 3+
features: COMPLETE SET: 25-piece urban track set including colourful track segments, supports, and a battery-operated car for endless racing fun
CUSTOMISABLE LAYOUTS: Multiple configuration options allow children to create their own unique track designs and racing experiences
BATTERY POWERED: Set includes a motorised car and batteries, enabling immediate play right out of the box
AGE APPROPRIATE: Specially designed for children aged 3 and above, offering safe and engaging play experience
CREATIVE PLAY: Track pieces feature vibrant colours and include curved sections, straight paths, and elevated elements for exciting racing adventures
description: Product Description Transform playtime into an exciting urban adventure with the Hotrodz Urban City Track Set! This 25-piece set features a vibrant, customisable track system complete with an impressive suspension bridge centrepiece. The colourful track pieces come in various shapes and sections, allowing young engineers to create multiple exciting layouts. The set includes a battery-operated red vehicle that zooms around the track, bringing the cityscape to life. Perfect for children aged 3 and above, this set combines creative building with dynamic play. The track pieces are designed in eye-catching colours including yellow, green, red, blue, and pink, making it visually engaging. Assembly is straightforward, and the included batteries mean children can start playing straight away. The set offers endless possibilities for configuration, encouraging spatial thinking and creative development. The sturdy construction ensures durability for extended play sessions, while the battery-operated car adds an element of excitement as it traverses the bridges and winding paths of your custom-built city track. Safety Warning Warning: Small Parts. Not Suitable For Children Under 3 Years
